subject: a few things....
body:
Just wanted to wish you a very Happy Thanksgiving.  Enjoy....everything
:) :)
 
I called Indochine and Sharon Eaglefeld is not working tonight.  I will
try again for her over the weekend/Monday type of thing and ask for her
resume.
 
Also....could I get my hair hightlighted on Thursday (29th)!!!!??????
 
:) Lesley
 
 
 
 
 
 
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
